questions.question: Define separated sets and disconnected sets, providing an example for each. Explain the difference between them.
questions.hint: Clearly explain the concepts with suitable examples

questions.question: Consider the set R - {0} and the set R - {1} in the real line. Determine whether each set is: (a) disconnected, (b) connected, (c) separated, and (d) a component. Explain your answers.
questions.hint: Use a diagram to illustrate your answers

questions.question: Suppose f: R -> R is a continuous function where R is the real line. Prove that the image of a connected subset of R under f is connected. Provide a counterexample to show that the image of a disconnected subset of R under f is not necessarily disconnected.
questions.hint: Use the definition of connectedness and continuity
